home.heroText: Imagine if every piece of industrial waste could be transformed into a new investment opportunity this is where EcoLink begins
home.aboutFirst: EcoLink was created to solve a growing environmental and industrial challenge the gap between waste production and effective recycling. Every day, valuable recyclable materials are lost due to inefficient systems and lack of connection between factories and recycling companies. This not only increases environmental harm but also wastes economic opportunities.
home.aboutSecond: At EcoLink, we bridge this gap through a smart digital platform that connects waste producers with recyclers in a seamless and efficient way. By transforming waste into valuable resources, we help businesses reduce costs, improve sustainability practices, and contribute to a cleaner future.
home.aboutSmall: We don't just manage waste we turn it into opportunity.
home.howSubtitle: Connecting industries in just a few seamless steps
home.ctaTitle: Optimize your waste. Maximize your value.
home.ctaText: Be part of the solution. Start transforming waste into value with EcoLink.

contact.title: Contact EcoLink
contact.subtitle: We're here to support your journey toward a more efficient and sustainable supply chain. Reach out to our team for inquiries, partnerships, or support.
contact.safeInfo: Your information is safe with us
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.bottomNote: EcoLink is committed to enabling smarter, more sustainable business decisions through technology-driven solutions.

contact.validEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.sent: Your message has been sent successfully!
contact.sendError: We could not send your message. Please try again.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing Built for Sustainable Growth
pricing.subtitle: EcoLink operates on a simple commission model connecting factories with recycling companies while ensuring fair and secure transactions.
pricing.exampleText: If a deal is completed for EGP 10,000 → EcoLink commission = EGP 1,000 (10%)
pricing.exampleNote: Commission is only charged after successful transactions.
pricing.step1Text: Suppliers upload waste details (category, quantity, price, location)
pricing.step2Text: Buyers filter and find suitable materials easily
pricing.step3Text: Both parties agree on the deal terms
pricing.step4Text: System processes payment and deducts commission automatically
pricing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about our pricing, payments, and process
pricing.faq1Q: When am I charged the 10% commission?
pricing.faq1A: The 10% commission is only charged after a transaction is successfully completed and confirmed by both parties.
pricing.faq2Q: What happens if the deal is canceled?
pricing.faq2A: No commission is charged if the transaction is canceled before successful completion.
pricing.faq3A: Payments are handled through a secure payment flow to protect both buyers and suppliers.
pricing.faq4A: No, there are no subscription fees now or later. EcoLink operates on a commission-based model, meaning you only pay 10% after a successful transaction.
